BLUESKY_HANDLE.label: Handle
BLUESKY_HANDLE.help: The BlueSky handle (username) for the agent account.

BLUESKY_DRY_RUN.label: Dry Run
BLUESKY_DRY_RUN.help: Enables or disables dry run mode when interacting with BlueSky; when true, operations are simulated but not executed.

BLUESKY_ENABLED.label: Enabled
BLUESKY_ENABLED.help: Enables or disables the BlueSky plugin.

BLUESKY_PASSWORD.label: Password
BLUESKY_PASSWORD.help: The app password for authentication with BlueSky.

BLUESKY_ENABLE_DMS.label: Enable Dms
BLUESKY_ENABLE_DMS.help: Enable processing of direct messages via the chat.bsky API.

BLUESKY_POLL_INTERVAL.label: Poll Interval
BLUESKY_POLL_INTERVAL.help: Polling interval in seconds for BlueSky operations such as fetching new notifications.

BLUESKY_ENABLE_POSTING.label: Enable Posting
BLUESKY_ENABLE_POSTING.help: Enables or disables the ability to post to BlueSky.

BLUESKY_ACTION_INTERVAL.label: Action Interval
BLUESKY_ACTION_INTERVAL.help: Interval in seconds between action-processing cycles.

BLUESKY_MAX_POST_LENGTH.label: Max Post Length
BLUESKY_MAX_POST_LENGTH.help: Maximum number of characters allowed in a BlueSky post.

BLUESKY_POST_IMMEDIATELY.label: Post Immediately
BLUESKY_POST_IMMEDIATELY.help: If true, posts are published immediately instead of waiting for a schedule.

BLUESKY_POST_INTERVAL_MAX.label: Post Interval Max
BLUESKY_POST_INTERVAL_MAX.help: Maximum interval in seconds between automated posts.

BLUESKY_POST_INTERVAL_MIN.label: Post Interval Min
BLUESKY_POST_INTERVAL_MIN.help: Minimum interval in seconds between automated posts.

BLUESKY_MAX_ACTIONS_PROCESSING.label: Max Actions Processing
BLUESKY_MAX_ACTIONS_PROCESSING.help: Maximum number of BlueSky actions to process in a single batch.

BLUESKY_ENABLE_ACTION_PROCESSING.label: Enable Action Processing
BLUESKY_ENABLE_ACTION_PROCESSING.help: Turns on or off automated action processing for BlueSky events.
